expectations.text: Response includes a preflight report section
expectations.evidence: Preflight ran for osal_mem_free fix. Arithmetic RISK (unsigned subtraction underflow wraps to huge value), resources RISK (HAL_EXIT_CRITICAL_SECTION must be paired with every return path). ADJUST PLAN.

expectations.text: Preflight includes an arithmetic check flagging the unsigned wraparound risk
expectations.evidence: Arithmetic RISK: 'block->size - OSAL_MEM_HDR_SIZE uses unsigned types with no underflow guard. A corrupted block header where size < OSAL_MEM_HDR_SIZE wraps to a huge positive value, causing the allocator to corrupt the free list.'
